cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match. So there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start in specific positions and then swap several times. Let me track each swap step by step. First, the starting positions are: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in the following order: 1. Dave and Eve trade positions. 2. Claire and Bob trade positions. 3. Alice and Bob trade positions. 4. Eve and Dave trade positions. 5. Bob and Alice trade positions. Hmm, maybe I should make a table or list to keep track of each player's position after each swap. Let me try that. Starting with the initial positions: Initial: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave moves to goalkeeper, and Eve moves to left winger. After first swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Claire becomes center midfielder, Bob becomes right midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice becomes right midfielder, Bob becomes fullback. After third swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Eve goes back to goalkeeper, Dave to left winger. After fourth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. So Alice becomes fullback, Bob becomes right midfielder. After fifth swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait, but the question is asking where Eve is at the end. After the fourth swap, Eve was back to goalkeeper, and the fifth swap was between Bob and Alice, which didn't involve Eve. So Eve's position remains goalkeeper? But let me check again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Let me go through each step again. Initial: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper 1. Dave and Eve swap: - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 2. Claire and Bob swap: - Claire: center midfielder - Bob: right midfielder 3. Alice and Bob swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback 4. Eve and Dave swap: - Eve: goalkeeper (since Dave was at goalkeeper) - Dave: left winger (since Eve was at left winger after first swap, but after the fourth swap, Eve goes back to goalkeeper and Dave goes back to left winger?) Wait, after first swap, Dave was goalkeeper and Eve was left winger. Then in the fourth swap, they trade again. So yes, Dave would go back to left winger and Eve to goalkeeper. So after the fourth swap, Eve is goalkeeper again. Then fifth swap is Bob and Alice swapping. Their positions before fifth swap were: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback After swapping: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder So no change
